title: diteilis nigra
intro: Diteilis nigra, also known as black nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Diteilis nigra is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and berries are commonly used in traditional medicine.
